American Spend: Indexing American Commerce. Starting with “Spend Market”
> American Spend is building the data layer of American commerce, a live and verifiable record of what America actually buys.
> Spend Market is a prediction market that resolves on verified U.S. consumer transaction data. Take a position on what American consumers will do, and real purchase data decides whether you were right.

If the Founder Cared About His Token, it’d Be 10x the Price
> Protocols with both equity and tokens often see equity prioritized over token holders, causing tokens to trade at steep discounts despite strong underlying businesses.
> Founders running dual equity-and-token structures are implicitly incentivized to prioritize equity, which is legally cleaner, easier to raise on, and better understood by investors.
> The proposed fix is for protocols to stop selling tokens to retail while reserving equity for VCs, and instead align tokenholder rights more closely with equity so the token isn't just a memecoin wearing a profitable business's logo.
Source:
https://twitter.com/563defi/status/2072735728065216596

The Great Descent
AI-driven intelligence is collapsing the cost of expertise and judgment, following the same cost-curve descent that turned smartphones from luxury items into ubiquitous tools
He concludes that this abundance of intelligence creates more human work overall (not less), but the real winners will be those who encode their own proprietary edge and institutional knowledge into AI systems instead of just consuming generic intelligence like everyone else
